criteria_results.criterion: CommitLogEntry and RepositoryCommitLogs types defined in src/types/git.ts
criteria_results.evidence: CommitLogEntry is defined as Pick<CommitInfo, 'shortHash' | 'message' | 'author'> at line 69. RepositoryCommitLogs is defined as Map<string, { name: string; commits: CommitLogEntry[] }> at line 75.

criteria_results.criterion: MAX_COMMIT_LOG_LENGTH and GIT_LOG_TOTAL_TIMEOUT_MS added to src/config/review-config.ts
criteria_results.evidence: MAX_COMMIT_LOG_LENGTH = 3000 at line 68. GIT_LOG_TOTAL_TIMEOUT_MS = 15_000 at line 74.

withTimeout<T>(promise, timeoutMs, fallback?) implemented at lines 154-179. TimeoutError class at lines 134-139. Supports fallback value on timeout and rejects with TimeoutError when no fallback provided.
Function at lines 408-452. Uses --all flag for all branches, fs.existsSync check for missing paths, GIT_COMMIT_LOG_TIMEOUT_MS (5000ms), unit separator field delimiter, returns empty array on error.
Function at lines 463-487. Uses Promise.allSettled for parallel execution, skips repositories with 0 commits, returns RepositoryCommitLogs Map.

criteria_results.criterion: buildSummaryPrompt accepts 4th argument commitLogs and generates <commit_log> section
criteria_results.evidence: 4th parameter commitLogs?: RepositoryCommitLogs at line 74. <commit_log> section built at lines 138-171 with repository headers showing name and commit count.

criteria_results.criterion: Tag escaping for <commit_log> and <user_data> in commit log content
criteria_results.evidence: ESCAPED_TAGS array includes 'commit_log' at line 27. sanitizeMessage escapes both <commit_log> and <user_data> tags. All commit content passes through sanitizeMessage.
logLength tracked and compared against MAX_COMMIT_LOG_LENGTH at lines 148 and 154. Truncation note appended when limit exceeded.
Check at line 175: if basePrompt.length > MAX_MESSAGE_LENGTH, commit log section is removed and prompt truncated.

getAllRepositories called at line 161, collectRepositoryCommitLogs called at line 164 wrapped with withTimeout(GIT_LOG_TOTAL_TIMEOUT_MS, new Map()), commitLogs passed to buildSummaryPrompt at line 171.

criteria_results.criterion: buildSummaryPrompt backward compatible (existing calls without commitLogs work)
criteria_results.evidence: 4th parameter is optional (commitLogs?: RepositoryCommitLogs). Existing tests call buildSummaryPrompt(messages, worktrees) and buildSummaryPrompt(messages, worktrees, userInstruction) without commitLogs - all pass.

criteria_results.criterion: All repositories (DB registered with existing path) have today's commits collected
criteria_results.evidence: getAllRepositories(db) fetches all DB-registered repos. getCommitsByDateRange checks fs.existsSync and returns [] for missing paths. collectRepositoryCommitLogs runs all in parallel.
git log args include '--all' at line 419 in getCommitsByDateRange.

criteria_results.criterion: Repositories with no commits are skipped
criteria_results.evidence: collectRepositoryCommitLogs only adds to Map when result.value.commits.length > 0 at line 478.

criteria_results.criterion: Non-existent path repositories are skipped without error
Individual git log timeout controlled by GIT_COMMIT_LOG_TIMEOUT_MS
criteria_results.evidence: GIT_COMMIT_LOG_TIMEOUT_MS = 5000 at line 390, passed to execFileAsync timeout option at line 425.
withTimeout wraps collectRepositoryCommitLogs with GIT_LOG_TOTAL_TIMEOUT_MS at line 164-167 in daily-summary-generator.ts.

criteria_results.criterion: Existing tests pass with new mocks
criteria_results.evidence: All 322 test files passed (6131 tests, 0 failures). daily-summary-generator tests include mocks for getAllRepositories, collectRepositoryCommitLogs, and withTimeout.

summary: All 14 acceptance criteria for Issue #627 (commit log in report) are satisfied. Type definitions (CommitLogEntry, RepositoryCommitLogs), configuration constants (MAX_COMMIT_LOG_LENGTH, GIT_LOG_TOTAL_TIMEOUT_MS), utility function (withTimeout), git log collection functions (getCommitsByDateRange, collectRepositoryCommitLogs), prompt builder integration (<commit_log> section with tag escaping and truncation), and daily summary generator integration (with timeout-wrapped commit log collection) are all correctly implemented. All 6131 unit tests pass and TypeScript type checking reports zero errors. Backward compatibility is maintained for existing buildSummaryPrompt callers.
